PADEL
Padel Community India (PCI) · Est. 2026

Play better.
Play consistently.
Play with your people.

PCI is India's first structured padel subscription network. Fixed courts. Competitive players. No logistics. Just show up and play, every weeknight, in your city.

Find your city How it works
What is PCI

A subscription.
Not a booking.
A commitment.

Finding good padel in India means either paying walk-in rates every time, chasing four people to confirm, or showing up to play with strangers at random skill levels. PCI fixes all three.

We lock in courts at the best venues in each city, form groups of 24 intermediate and above players, and sell subscriptions. You pay once, you show up, you play. Every weeknight. With the same competitive people. No hassle.

Each group is venue-specific and timeslot-specific: morning or late evening, your city, your venue. When we fill a group, we open another. City by city, venue by venue.

How it works
01
Choose your group
Find your city, your venue, and your preferred timeslot: morning or late evening. Each group has 24 spots.
02
Subscribe
Pick a 1, 3, 6 or 12-month plan. Pay upfront. Your spot is locked for the duration. Longer plans get better rates.
03
Register on Reclub
Join your private group on Reclub. Register for each session, vote on formats, see who's playing, track your stats.
04
Show up and play
Courts ready, balls fresh, mineral water waiting. Two 90-minute sessions per night. Structured, competitive padel with people who take the game seriously.
Every subscription includes
Dedicated Courts
Fixed courts at your venue, locked for your group every weeknight. No booking, no hassle.
Tournament-Grade Balls
We never play more than 3 to 4 hours with the same balls. You always play with balls that have bounce and feel.
Bottled Mineral Water
Bottled mineral water waiting at the court every session. Nothing to sort, nothing to pay for.
Competitive Peers
Intermediate and above only. Same faces every week. Real partnerships, real game improvement.
Reclub App Access
Register for sessions, vote on formats, track stats, and chat with your group. All in one place.
Tournaments & Social Events
One food and drinks event per month. The game continues off the court.
Game Footage
Professional cameras on every court. Watch your sessions back, track your improvement and share highlights.
Founding Member Welcome Kit
Club tshirt and cap for all founding batch members.
What we play
Format
Americano
Rotating partners, everyone plays with everyone. Points-based and competitive. Great for getting to know the whole group's game.
Format
Mexicano
Paired with and against players at your level as scores update in real time. Every match stays competitive regardless of who's playing.
Format
Spontaneous Tournaments
Fixed teams, bracket play, bragging rights. Called on the night when numbers are right and the energy demands it.
Session
Drills & Practice
Serve patterns, wall play, volleys, lobs. Structured improvement nights. One of the most underrated sessions in the calendar.
Format
Open Doubles
Pick your partner, challenge any pair. Classic padel on your terms, with people you trust on your side.
Wildcard
Whatever the Night Calls For
Sometimes the group decides. Format flexes around who shows up and what the session calls for.
Pricing

Choose your commitment.

One price across all cities and venues. The longer you commit, the better the monthly rate. Everything is included. No extras, no surprises.

Plan Per month Total
Monthly
Full flexibility. Spot not guaranteed for the following month.
₹10,000/mo
₹10,000
3 Months Most popular
Spot secured for the full quarter.
₹9,000/mo
₹27,000
6 Months
Half-year commitment. Spot locked, continuity guaranteed.
₹8,000/mo
₹48,000
Annual Best value
Your spot for the full year. The sharpest rate.
₹6,000/mo
₹72,000
The app
Reclub logo

Everything runs
through Reclub.

No WhatsApp chaos. No manual sign-up sheets. The subscription runs on Reclub, a dedicated app built exactly for sports groups like this one. Every subscriber gets access from day one.

Private group · Subscribers only
Register for tonight in one tap
See who's confirmed, who's on the waitlist. No chasing, no confirming over chat.
Vote on the format
Mexicano or round robin? The group votes, the Day Leader locks it in.
Team draws & pairings
Fair, random team divisions. No awkward picking, no same pairs every night.
Stats & history
Sessions played, wins, partners. Your padel record, in one place.
Group chat
Talk game, share clips, plan sessions. Without the WhatsApp noise.
Locations

Where we operate

Starting in Pune. More cities coming. Each city has its own page with venue details and available groups.

hunting for courts?
